{
  "rules": [
    {
      "parameter": "gen.components_accessible",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "true",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Components shall be accessible for inspection, isolation, removal, and replacement."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "gen.safety_critical_devices_independently_identified",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "true",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Safety-critical devices shall be independently identified and fail to a safe state."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "gen.safety_critical_devices_fail_safe",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "true",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Safety-critical devices shall be independently identified and fail to a safe state."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "gen.internal_components_permanently_identified",
      "operator": "==",
      "value": "true",
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Internal wiring, terminals, piping, and accessories shall be permanently identified."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "gen.fuel_autonomy_100_load",
      "operator": ">=",
      "value": 24,
      "unit": "h",
      "condition": "at 100% load",
      "quote": "Fuel autonomy at 100% load shall be not less than 24 h."
    }
  ]
}
